command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== 1. Telegram ingress METHOD: polling or webhook? ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin)['result']; print('webhook url:', repr(d.get('url')) or 'EMPTY=polling', '| pending:', d.get('pending_update_count'), '| last_error:', repr(d.get('last_error_message')))"

echo ""
echo "=== 2. Is Remy actively polling RIGHT NOW? (process + recent getUpdates) ==="
ps aux | grep -iE "openclaw|node" | grep -v grep | head -2 | awk '{print $2, $11, $12, $13}'
LF="/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log"
echo "recent polling activity:"
grep -iE "getUpdates|polling|long.?poll|telegram.*poll" "$LF" 2>/dev/null | tail -3 | cut -c1-120

echo ""
echo "=== 3. Model backend Remy calls for responses ==="
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'))
print('model primary:', d['agents']['defaults'].get('model'))
print('ollama baseUrl:', d.get('models',{}).get('providers',{}).get('ollama',{}).get('baseUrl'))
"

echo ""
echo "=== 4. Can Remy reach the Ollama model server? ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  ollama 192.168.0.39:11434 reachable: %{http_code}\n" --max-time 8 http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== 5. Gateway listening ports on Remy ==="
ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "9119|443|node" | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== 6. agentRuntime - does Remy use claude-cli or ollama for the agent loop? ==="
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'))
models=d['agents']['defaults'].get('models',{})
for k,v in models.items():
    rt=v.get('agentRuntime',{}).get('id','(default/ollama)')
    print(f'  {k}: runtime={rt}')
"
REMOTE
